Title: Lead Component
URL: https://swatkb.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/DRUP/pages/20513126
Version: 7
---

The
Lead
component is useful for pull quotes or highlighting other important text. Optionally, a Call to Action Link can be used to guide visitors towards related content.
Elements
Title (
required, not displayed
)
Abstract
Call to Action Link
Examples

Step-by-step Instructions
Provide a
Title
for the
Lead.
Note: This is used for internal purposes only and is not displayed to visitors.
Provide the
Abstract
that will be presented as a
Lead
component.
Optionally, provide a
Call to Action Link
in order to drive traffic to related content.
